title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 27
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a work shift at a garden centre.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Are you working at the garden centre this weekend? || Girl: Yes, but not on Saturday afternoon as usual. The manager changed the rota because the weather looks bad. || Boy: So when are you going in? || Girl: I can’t do Sunday morning, and Friday evening is already covered, so [1]I’m doing the Sunday afternoon shift[/1]. || Boy: That’s not too bad. You’ll still have some free time later. || Girl: Exactly. I can finish my homework then. || Girl: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Are you working at the garden centre this weekend?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, but not on Saturday afternoon as usual. The manager changed the rota because the weather looks bad.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: So when are you going in?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I can’t do Sunday morning, and Friday evening is already covered, so I’m doing the Sunday afternoon shift.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That’s not too bad. You’ll still have some free time later.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Exactly. I can finish my homework then.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.question: When is the speaker working?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, garden centre worker opening gates in the morning, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, garden centre worker watering plants in the afternoon, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, garden centre worker sweeping in the evening, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says they are doing the Sunday afternoon shift.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a community centre.
questions.audio_script: Man: What did you do at the community centre? I thought you were trying drama practice. || Girl: We planned to, but the stage lights failed. || Man: Did you try an art class? || Girl: No, because there were not enough brushes. In the end, [1]we spent the afternoon doing a music workshop[/1]. It was more fun than I expected. || Man: Maybe I’ll go next time. || Girl: You should. They lend you everything you need, and the staff are friendly. || Girl: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost purse.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you found your purse yet? I know you were worried about it this morning. || Man: Not really. I checked the shoe shop, because I was sure I had it there after trying on trainers. || Woman: And what about the pharmacy? You went there afterwards, didn't you? || Man: Yes, but nobody had seen it. Then the hairdresser called and said [1]my purse was beside the mirror at the salon[/1]. I’m going to pick it up before it closes. || Woman: Great. At least you know where it is now, and you can stop looking everywhere.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you found your purse yet? I know you were worried about it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not really. I checked the shoe shop, because I was sure I had it there after trying on trainers.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And what about the pharmacy? You went there afterwards, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but nobody had seen it. Then the hairdresser called and said my purse was beside the mirror at the salon. I’m going to pick it up before it closes.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Great. At least you know where it is now, and you can stop looking everywhere.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a sports day.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are you ready for the sports day tomorrow? I was going to pack my jacket, because it looked cloudy in the morning. || Man: I saw the latest message from school. The main problem is the races are long. || Woman: Should I take my scarf? || Man: Not really. [1]The teacher said everyone should bring a water bottle[/1], because there is nowhere to buy drinks. || Woman: Thanks. I’ll put that in my bag now, before I forget again. My bag is by the door already.

dialogue.text: Should I take my scarf?

questions.context: You hear a teacher giving information about the language class.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Before you go, remember that the language class is not in its usual place today. Some students thought it was in the room six, but the teacher is ill in that room. Others may wait near the computer room, although the internet is not working. [1]Please go straight to the library at nine thirty[/1]. If your friend is absent this morning, send them a quick message so they do not arrive late. The teacher will start as soon as everyone is there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Before you go, remember that the language class is not in its usual place today. Some students thought it was in the room six, but the teacher is ill in that room. Others may wait near the computer room, although the internet is not working. Please go straight to the library at nine thirty. If your friend is absent this morning, send them a quick message so they do not arrive late. The teacher will start as soon as everyone is there.

questions.context: You hear an announcement for passengers travelling to York.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Good afternoon. This is a message for passengers travelling to York. You may have seen the earlier notice asking you to wait near the main bridge, but that information has changed. [1]Please go to the station exit now[/1]. Do not use the river path, because the river path is flooded. Staff will be nearby if you need help with luggage or directions. Please move carefully and keep your tickets ready for checking. Thank you for your patience today. || Speaker: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Good afternoon. This is a message for passengers travelling to York. You may have seen the earlier notice asking you to wait near the main bridge, but that information has changed. Please go to the station exit now. Do not use the river path, because the river path is flooded. Staff will be nearby if you need help with luggage or directions. Please move carefully and keep your tickets ready for checking. Thank you for your patience today.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.question: Where should passengers go now?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, people walking on a river path, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, people leaving through a station exit, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, people standing at a taxi rank, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The announcement says passengers should go to the station exit now.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a broken watch.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did anyone fix your watch? || Boy: Yes, but it wasn’t the problem I expected. I thought it was the strap, because it looked odd yesterday. || Woman: Was it the glass then? || Boy: I wondered that too, because the strap looked old. Then someone checked it carefully and [1]the watch started after the jeweller put in a new battery[/1]. || Woman: So it was quite simple. || Boy: Yes, luckily. I need it tonight, so I’m glad it is working again. || Boy: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did anyone fix your watch?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, but it wasn’t the problem I expected. I thought it was the strap, because it looked odd yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Was it the glass then?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I wondered that too, because the strap looked old. Then someone checked it carefully and the watch started after the jeweller put in a new battery.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So it was quite simple.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, luckily. I need it tonight, so I’m glad it is working again.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, watch strap, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.
